personalInfo.name: Devesh
personalInfo.description: Building scalable, data-intensive microservices with Node.js, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, and Redis.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a Backend Engineer with 1.8+ years of experience building scalable, data-intensive microservices. My journey in software development has been driven by a passion for solving complex distributed systems challenges.

Currently at Educational Initiatives, I architect and maintain multi-tenant platforms serving 100K+ monthly active users. I specialize in event-driven architectures, database optimization, and building resilient systems that scale.

I graduated from Pandit Deendayal Energy University with a BTech in Computer Engineering and a CGPA of 9.80. Beyond coding, I've led technical communities and published research in NLP-driven drug classification.

cards.title: Leadership
